articles.title: Cops nab man over social media comment allegedly insulting religion
articles.summary: KUALA LUMPUR: A man has been arrested after uploading a comment that allegedly insulted the Prophet Muhammad, city police say. Read full story

articles.title: Teenage girl, boyfriend, four family members arrested after remains of baby found in Melaka
articles.summary: ALOR GAJAH: A teenage girl, her boyfriend and four of her family members have been arrested following the discovery of the skeletal remains of a baby, believed to have been born about four months ago,

articles.title: Pedestrian distracted by phone injured in three-vehicle accident in Bangsar
articles.summary: KUALA LUMPUR: A woman who was using her mobile phone while crossing the road was injured in an accident involving three vehicles along Jalan Bangsar here on Tuesday (March 24). Read full story

articles.title: 'As long as you can': Dr M returns to work
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: Tun Dr Mahathir Mohamad returned to work at the Perdana Leadership Foundation on Wednesday (March 25). Read full story

articles.title: Malaysia, Singapore share serious concern over West Asia situation, says Anwar

articles.title: Cops probing viral incident of teenager allegedly slapped at LRT station food outlet
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: Police are investigating a viral incident involving a teenage boy who was allegedly slapped by a man at an LRT station here on Tuesday (March 24). Read full story

articles.title: Newly-upgraded water park in JB closed temporarily due to vandalism
articles.summary: JOHOR BARU: The newly-upgraded water recreation park at Hutan Bandar MBJB (Forest City) has been closed barely two days after it was open to the public due to vandalism. Read full story

articles.title: Pasir Gudang factory worker dies in motorcycle-garbage truck accident
articles.summary: PASIR GUDANG: A factory worker died on the spot after the motorcycle he was riding was involved in an accident with a rigid garbage truck. Read full story
